summary: For light in vacuum the wavelength and frequency are tied by the speed of light: λ = c/f. Use it to convert between colour (wavelength) and frequency.
method: Identify whether the wavelength or the frequency is known.
Rearrange λ = c/f for the unknown.
Use SI units (m, Hz); the calculator supplies c ≈ 3 × 10⁸ m/s.
Substitute and compute; visible light comes out around 10⁻⁷ m (hundreds of nm).

example.title: Wavelength of an FM radio wave
steps: The unknown is λ, so use λ = c/f.
